name: assignments-hub
description: Monorepo root — present only so Railway's builder detects a Node runtime to install. The real app lives in backend/ (NestJS API, also serves frontend/ statically — see backend/src/main.ts) and frontend/ (static dashboards, no build step). Railway's Build/Start Commands cd into backend/ for the actual install/build/run.

scripts.build: cd backend && npm ci && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.start: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy && node dist/src/main.js
